features.featureTitle: In the About section (AboutSection.tsx), replace the current profile photo with the uploaded image 'my portfolio image-1.jpg', saved as 'frontend/public/assets/generated/debraj-profile.jpg'. The image must be rendered inside the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2] (the photo container div). Use the generated asset path as the src. Preserve all existing styling (rounded corners, border, shadow, etc.).
